이사야 48:1.content: “Hear this, house of Jacob, you who are called by the name of Israel, and have come out of the waters of Judah. You swear by Yahweh’s name, and make mention of the God of Israel, but not in truth, nor in righteousness—

이사야 48:2.content: for they call themselves citizens of the holy city, and rely on the God of Israel; Yahweh of Armies is his name.

이사야 48:3.content: I have declared the former things from of old. Yes, they went out of my mouth, and I revealed them. I did them suddenly, and they happened.

이사야 48:4.content: Because I knew that you are obstinate, and your neck is an iron sinew, and your brow bronze;

이사야 48:5.content: therefore I have declared it to you from of old; before it came to pass I showed it to you; lest you should say, ‘My idol has done them. My engraved image and my molten image has commanded them.’

이사야 48:6.content: You have heard it. Now see all this. And you, won’t you declare it? “I have shown you new things from this time, even hidden things, which you have not known.

이사야 48:7.content: They are created now, and not from of old. Before today, you didn’t hear them, lest you should say, ‘Behold, I knew them.’

이사야 48:8.content: Yes, you didn’t hear. Yes, you didn’t know. Yes, from of old your ear was not opened, for I knew that you dealt very treacherously, and were called a transgressor from the womb.

이사야 48:9.content: For my name’s sake, I will defer my anger, and for my praise, I hold it back for you so that I don’t cut you off.

이사야 48:10.content: Behold, I have refined you, but not as silver. I have chosen you in the furnace of affliction.

이사야 48:11.content: For my own sake, for my own sake, I will do it; for how would my name be profaned? I will not give my glory to another.

이사야 48:12.content: “Listen to me, O Jacob, and Israel my called: I am he. I am the first. I am also the last.

이사야 48:13.content: Yes, my hand has laid the foundation of the earth, and my right hand has spread out the heavens. when I call to them, they stand up together.

이사야 48:14.content: “Assemble yourselves, all of you, and hear! Who among them has declared these things? He whom Yahweh loves will do what he likes to Babylon, and his arm will be against the Chaldeans.

이사야 48:15.content: I, even I, have spoken. Yes, I have called him. I have brought him and he shall make his way prosperous.

이사야 48:16.content: “Come near to me and hear this: “From the beginning I have not spoken in secret; from the time that it happened, I was there.” Now the Lord Yahweh has sent me with his Spirit.

이사야 48:17.content: Yahweh, your Redeemer, the Holy One of Israel says: “I am Yahweh your God, who teaches you to profit, who leads you by the way that you should go.

이사야 48:18.content: Oh that you had listened to my commandments! Then your peace would have been like a river and your righteousness like the waves of the sea.

이사야 48:19.content: Your offspring also would have been as the sand and the descendants of your body like its grains. His name would not be cut off nor destroyed from before me.”

이사야 48:20.content: Leave Babylon! Flee from the Chaldeans! With a voice of singing announce this, tell it even to the end of the earth: say, “Yahweh has redeemed his servant Jacob!”

이사야 48:21.content: They didn’t thirst when he led them through the deserts. He caused the waters to flow out of the rock for them. He also split the rock and the waters gushed out.

이사야 48:22.content: “There is no peace”, says Yahweh, “for the wicked.”
